feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Give it to me straight. Will I, as a grown man, be seen as a pervert if I went t…
entry.content: Give it to me straight. Will I, as a grown man, be seen as a pervert if I went to see My Neighbor Totoro in the cinemas? Will people in the cinemas be judging me that I am watching this movie? I am terrified of going to see this movie alone.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /b/ Random: anyone have tips on dealing with trauma.
entry.content: I’ve been carrying a secret for over a decade, and I’m tired of the weight. Between the ages of 8 and 12, I was sexually abused by an uncle. He used his position to manipulate me, telling me I was "special" and that what we were doing was a secret. I was a child, and I was terrified, so I just froze. He made me feel like I was part of something he called "pretty," but it was abuse, and it was wrong. He hurt me in ways that stay with me every day. Even now, I struggle with flashbacks, memory gaps
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: It's more than a feeliiiiing
entry.content: It's more than a feeliiiiing
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /int/ International: Does it make sense to learn any other languages?
entry.content: I already speak Spanish (obviously) and English with perfect fluency. I'm also polishing and finishing up my French because my mom made me start learning when I was a teen and I see it as unfinished business. If I don't really plan on moving anywhere, does it make any logical sense to take up any other language? Considering that almost everything important is translated into English and that it will probably remain the lingua franca of the world for as long as I'm alive (currently early 20s).
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /bwg/ Blacked Waifus General #363
entry.content: >PAAG Edition This thread is for anons that are into straight blacked/interracial content involving their waifus, without the extreme and political content of the main blacked thread. No 3D/real content. No graphs, headlines, tributes, or references to murder or suicide. No scat/toilet/gay shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. All games, anime and gacha waifus welc
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Here's all the records Obession Broke
entry.content: * Highest-grossing movie in Focus Features history. * First movie in 44 years (since E.T) to gain in box office for 3 weekends in a row * Highest-grossing film ever made for under $1 million beating Enter the Dragon 54 years ago. * Highest-grossing film ever bought at a film festival. * Highest-grossing live-action, non-franchise English film in the 2020s
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: How is it that male pattern baldness is genetic when it seems that its affecting…
entry.content: How is it that male pattern baldness is genetic when it seems that its affecting the majority of men, and now moreso at younger ages?? Are women globally just selecting and breeding with men that have balding genes?? I dont fuckin buy it, the genetic argument seems its just a scapegoat to hide whatever is the true culprit of male pattern baldness. Why are women only breeding with baldies?????? I thought they try to select for best genes, so if it really is all genetic why are women only selectin
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: GNOME went from the best and most stable DE to an unusable piece of shit at the …
entry.content: GNOME went from the best and most stable DE to an unusable piece of shit at the KDE tier. My CPU literally goes to 100% and apparently interrupts other programs (causing errors) IF I MOVE THE MOUSE. How do you even fuck up so bad? And no, I don't use a single gnome extension or run some bizarre software from some pajeet repo. I just have a terminal, my IDE and a browser. That's it, I am tired of this piece of shit gay nigger software. I am going to install Hyprland.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: Linux Fox Narrative Musings
entry.content: Had some thoughts about what could make for a possibly fun short run internet comic, or something else if insane enough, around "That time when transsexual types co-opted a obscure never-made 90's mascot". Might do something with this, good chance I won't. Posting partially to fish for thoughts/ideas to make this feel more 'correct' in terms of relevant hardware and software, or just narratively in general. Partially just so this doesn't rot on a hard drive for the rest of eternity. >”Linux Fox”
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >browsing some webtoon groups and found this AI-generated panel Honestly, layout…
entry.content: >browsing some webtoon groups and found this AI-generated panel Honestly, layout-wise and coloring-wise, it looks surprisingly clean for an automated slop comic. Hands aside, how long until we see thousands of these fully AI "manhwa" series flooding the market? Thoughts on the style?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Fly through the fire
entry.content: >a few months back, i had the pleasure of meeting author tui sutherland, behind the incredible series of books, wings of fire. approaching the release of her 16th book, we sat down to talk about what a song honoring this might look like. here we are, something a little different than what i’ve ever done, fly through the fire - from wings of fire, out this friday july 17th. Expectation?
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Everyday i felt like killing myself… until
entry.content: >homeless >no friends >felt like killing myself >someone came >thought he was retarded at first > got to know him, and that he was in a similar position as me >lets me live with him >been living with him since 2017 >still has depression but no longer wanting to kill myself.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >Different products come from the same silicon. A company may manufacture one ch…
entry.content: >Different products come from the same silicon. A company may manufacture one chip design and sell it as several models by enabling different clock speeds or features. This keeps production efficient and offers products at different price points. They're selling garbage. Plain and simple.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Sekino
entry.content: Discuss a game for men. Dark Souls fans can slapfight with Elden Ring fans and argue about the lore accuracy and headcanon of their dolls and how much sense it makes. Bloodborne fans are a strange combination of fedora and edgy Shadow the Hedgehog. Demons' Souls fans are even weirder and no one really talks about them.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

He took the Oscar checklist and wipe

entry.title: /g/ Technology: i busted the CIA while they were trying to use intel ME on me. i suspended my co…
entry.content: i busted the CIA while they were trying to use intel ME on me. i suspended my computer and then i went to bed. i woke up and i could hear a clicking sound coming from under my desk. i climb under there and the noise is coming from my external hard drive even though my entire computer is not running. i think they were slowly moving my platter around trying to read something. shills on here told me intel ME was safe and effective
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /int/ International: 5 Reasons Why German Is The Superior Language
entry.content: >1) German is the only language that can create a brand-new word faster than English can explain it. Why borrow a phrase when you can simply weld six nouns together into a single linguistic superweapon and pretend it has existed since Charlemagne? >2) German verbs are so disciplined they refuse to appear until the end of the sentence By the time you finally hear the verb, you've had enough time to reconsider your life choices, file three forms, and accept the inevitable. > 3) Every German noun c
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I could be black or an Indian. I could be born in India or Congo. But I could be…
entry.content: I could be black or an Indian. I could be born in India or Congo. But I could be born as a blond boy in Sweden. I could be born with a disease, syndrome, mental disorder, or condition. I could be handicapped or queer (not in sexuality and gender sense, just an abnormal person), but I could be a 100% healthy normal blond boy born in Sweden. I don't know if I'm lucky. I could be worse things, but I could be better things. I'm wondering
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: Artist/Commissioner Rant General #1040
entry.content: /acrg/ - Artist/Commissioner Rant General #1040 Dni interraction Edition Remember to SCREENCAP your links so we can laugh when they delete their posts. Talk about artists or commissioners, mostly the bad ones or those who got under your skin. Share your experiences and get angry with us. For all artists (and commissioners who are close friends with artists) here, beware of: Horu, Pixxy, OkiOppai, Timedwatcher, AnythingGoes, Skitterleaf, kathielnotfound (Jocelyn Jones), and Snoopcrow/jbunny/j6un9
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /news/ News: MAGA Melts Down as Worst States to Live in Are Revealed
entry.content: >There’s a link connecting all the states on the list. Several MAGA and Republican figures are fuming over a list of the 10 worst U.S. states to live in, all of which are red states. CNBC’s ranking factored in several “Quality of Life” issues, such as healthcare and reproductive rights, crime rates, air quality, civil rights laws, and inclusivity. Based on this methodology, CNBC ranked Tennessee as the worst state to live in the U.S., followed by Texas, Indiana, Louisiana, Georgia, Utah, Missour
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Why gay comedian, Ricky Gervais, wants you to be an atheist
entry.content: According to Ricky Gervais, the famous gay comedian who has been married to a woman for four decades and has no children, there is no such thing as "God" and people should instead follow the dictates of science and reason. Gervais: >No I am [an atheist] because atheism is only rejecting a claim that there is a God. Atheism isn’t a belief system. This is atheism in a nutshell. The star of hit show 'The Office' continued: >So basically, you believe, you deny one less God than I do. You don’t belie
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: George Lucas "AI is the future if filmmaking"
entry.content: >The argument extends to artificial intelligence (AI), a subject that immediately animates Lucas. “Artificial intelligence means it’s much easier for us to make movies,” he says. “It’s very much like sitting here saying, ‘Well, I believe the horse and the buggy is really where it’s at. These cars, they break down, they need gas, there’s all kinds of problems with them and pretty soon they’ll be making them into tanks, and then they’ll be killing people. It’s terrible.’ There’s nothing you can do
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film
